---
title: "An Object in Life By the Author of Sunlight in the Clouds"
---

## An Object in Life By the Author of Sunlight in the Clouds
**Date:** 1860
**Imprint:** London:

### Notes

This was serialized in <i>MP</i> from July 1857. When <i>Sunlight in the Clouds was </i>published in <i>MP</i> (1851) it was signed H. L. C., and it seems possible that the works published by ‘the Author of <i>Sunlight in the Clouds’</i> are by Harriet Lucy Cox.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
